# Fully-pinned, hash-verified lock of the CORE runtime dependencies (the set
# the Docker image installs from agent/requirements.txt). Optional IM-channel
# extras are intentionally excluded — one of them (slackify-markdown>=4.4.0)
# is unresolvable on PyPI, which is why a project-wide `uv lock` cannot run.
#
# Universal (multi-platform) resolution bounded to Python 3.11 (matching the
# Docker image's python:3.11-slim) so environment markers pick the right wheel
# per-platform (e.g. numpy is marked python_full_version < '3.12') while still
# covering both x86_64 and aarch64 runtime/build hosts.
#
# Regenerate after editing agent/requirements.txt:
#    uv pip compile agent/requirements.txt --generate-hashes --universal --python-version 3.11 -o requirements-lock.txt

    --hash=sha256:cb10e0c0d2591636716ad2fe402e977c16d71bdaf76bb8cb49e8a6633596f736
